title: Haus Incrementality Data: Manual ABO Beats Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns Long-Term
insight: Analysis of 640 incrementality tests over 18 months ($14M spend) by Haus found that Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns (ASC) outperform at midpoint (+9%), but Manual Ad Set Budget Optimization (ABO) campaigns deliver $12 more revenue per $100 spent by the end. ASC burns through high-intent audiences quickly then struggles — it front-loads results. Manual ABO campaigns build audiences gradually and find buyer pockets ASC misses. Recommendation: use ASC tactically for sales/promotions, use Manual ABO for sustainable scaling.
raw_excerpt: ASC campaigns win early (9% better at midpoint) but Manual campaigns destroy them long-term. Manual delivered $12 MORE revenue per $100 spent by the end. ASC burns through your highest-intent audience fast, then struggles. It's like sprinting a marathon.
source_title: Tweet - Haus incrementality report on ASC vs Manual
actionable_steps: Don't default to Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns (ASC) for all campaigns — evaluate campaign duration and goals
Use ASC tactically during sales events and promotions where quick optimization matters
Use Manual ABO campaigns for sustained scaling and long-term growth
Monitor ASC campaigns for audience exhaustion signs (rising CPAs after initial strong performance)

title: Value Optimization Requires 6+ Price Point Ranges to Work Well
insight: According to a Meta Product Manager at the 2025 Performance Summit, value optimization works best when the value distribution has at least 6 different price point ranges. This means VO is better suited for catalogs with meaningful price variation rather than single-product or narrow-AOV stores. If your product range is too narrow, VO has insufficient signal to differentiate high-value from low-value conversions.
raw_excerpt: On day 2 of the Meta Performance Summit I heard a golden nugget from a Meta Product manager: 'Value optimization works best if the value distribution is at least 6. As in 6 value ranges of price points.'
source_title: Tweet - Meta Performance Summit insight on VO
actionable_steps: Audit your product catalog for price point variation before enabling VO
If you have 6+ distinct price ranges, test value optimization
If your catalog has narrow AOV range, stick with conversion optimization
